title: Cinematic
description: Minecraft, but cinematic. The best visuals the game has to offer.
body:
### What is Cinematic? Cinematic is a modpack that aims to transform the Minecraft experience into a more cinematic one. It does so by modifying the games visuals, textures, and audio to create a more cinematic experience. ### Features - Great visuals with Photon Shaders and Complementary Shaders - PBR and overhauled textures - Improved sound ### Credits Thanks to [AsianHalfSquat ](https://www.youtube.com/@AsianHalfSquat) for the shader configurations and initial idea. Be sure to check out his video on how to make Minecraft look cinematic.
#

Screenshots

![A wide mountain range, Photon Shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Idcr6MGU/images/db622e6cc67d59815b30ad0c389f2043322be18d.png) ![A huge valley with a river flowing through it, Photon Shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Idcr6MGU/images/fba9e72378ea002873dea08e92a74cfa0c554ee4.png) ![Steve watching the sunset, Photon Shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Idcr6MGU/images/2ba846ecdcc4af8745015e794c53cdc6667c77de.png)
